name: Core Concepts in Hindu Philosophy
author: Prof. Dr. Pradip Gandhi
specialty: A Comprehensive Exploration of Classical Hindu Thought
description: An introductory survey organized into seven parts, moving from Vedic and Upanishadic foundations through metaphysical, cosmological, and ethical concepts, the six classical Darshanas and four Vedanta schools, the Nastika systems, and closing with sadhana as lived practice.
whatsapp_message: Hi! I'm interested in learning more about Core Concepts in Hindu Philosophy.
